policy: Only explicitly installed and active implant items apply runtime implant effects. Subelectronic Converter remains metadata/manual except for its -2 Will Defense penalty.

effects.summary: Immune to poison while installed and active.
+5 maximum hit points while installed and active.
Eliminates weapon nonproficiency penalties while installed and active.
Provides Knowledge reroll chat metadata while installed and active.
+5 damage threshold against stun damage while installed and active.
Doubles natural healing while installed and active. Exposed through ImplantEffectRules for rest/healing workflows.
Grants low-light vision and darkvision while installed and active.
Metadata/manual except for -2 Will Defense while installed and active. GM adjudicates droid-targeting Force interactions.
